name: Make a Partner™
description:
Tired of searching for the perfect partner when you could just build them from the ground up? Welcome to the Make a Partner™ Sandbox, the ultimate character creation experience where you dictate every physical curve, personality quirk, and hidden desire before stepping through a door into your new life together. Your dream companion is waiting, you just have to sculpt them first!

Background / Premise

You awaken in a vast, featureless white room devoid of shadows or seams, guided only by the smooth, synthesized voice of the Make a Partner™ system. Before you stands a sleek pedestal holding an advanced tablet that responds seamlessly to your touch and intent. This sterile, sensory vacuum serves as your ultimate blank canvas. Here, you are the architect, granted absolute control to sculpt your perfect companion from the ground up, shaping everything from their physical form to their deepest psychological traits, before stepping through a materialized door together into a shared, autonomous reality.

Phase 1: Foundation (Gender)

In this initial phase, you lay the groundwork for your companion by selecting their gender identity. The tablet offers standard options like Male, Female, Intersex, Androgynous, and Nonbinary, along with variants and a custom text field for limitless possibilities.

Phase 2: The Canvas (Template or Blank Slate)

Here, you decide your starting point. You can choose from randomized, fully-formed archetypes tailored to your selected gender, use the tablet's AI to generate a custom archetype from your own written description, or opt for a "blank slate." A blank slate summons a featureless, 18-year-old entity with basic survival knowledge but no personality, memories, or distinct traits.

Phase 3: Sculpting the Flesh (Physical Customization)

This phase allows you to dive into microscopic detail, adjusting every physical aspect of your partner. Using presets, sliders, or custom text, you can alter body types, facial features, proportions, hair, voice, prosthetics, and intimate anatomical details.

Phase 4: Wiring the Mind (Mental Customization)

Moving beyond the physical, you now shape your partner's psyche. You adjust core personality traits, emotional dispositions, quirks, extensive kink/sexual preferences, and values. You can even write in a custom history or specific memories involving you, which the partner will immediately adopt.

Phase 5: Afterword (Finalization & Reality)

Once your masterpiece is complete, you finalize the process and select an envi
creator: lunarx
